     <TargetFramework>net9.0</TargetFramework>
     <IsPackable>false</IsPackable>
   </PropertyGroup>
   <ItemGroup>
     <PackageReference Include="Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk" Version="17.13.0" />
     <PackageReference Include="MSTest" Version="3.8.0" />
   </ItemGroup>
 </Project>

data.content: The project uses **MSTest 3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true`). Tests are categorized via `[TestCategory]` attributes. Let me run just the Integration tests.
data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) as the test framework. The tests have `TestCategory` attributes — "Unit" and "Integration". The user wants to run only the integration tests.

The `Directory.Build.props` has `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` set to true, which means it uses the newer Microsoft Testing Platform integration with `dotnet test`.

To filter for integration tests with MSTest, I can use `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.
